name: Avena Terminal Intelligence
description: Spain's first AI-native property intelligence agent. Provides real-time deal scoring, market analysis, yield calculations, and investment signals for Spanish new-build property across Costa Blanca, Costa Calida and Costa del Sol.

skills.name: Property Search
skills.description: Search 1,881+ scored Spanish new-build properties by region, budget, type, score, yield and beach distance
examples: Find 3-bed villas under 300k in Costa Blanca with >20% discount
Show me beach properties with yield above 6%
Best scored apartments in Orihuela Costa

skills.name: Market Analysis
skills.description: Regional price trends, avg price per m2, discount rates, and market regime for Spanish coastal property

skills.name: Investment Signals
skills.description: Alpha signals: score outliers, deep discounts, yield spikes, geographic mispricing, and market timing indicators

skills.name: Yield Calculator
skills.description: Calculate gross/net rental yield for any property using AirDNA-calibrated short-term rental data for 100+ towns

license: Free for read-only access. Commercial use: contact henrik@xaviaestate.com
